title: Homepage loads primary sections
description: Verifies the homepage renders its core landing content for shopping entry points.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section content is displayed
Verify a category grid and featured products are displayed

title: Homepage category card navigates into catalog browsing
description: Verifies users can enter browsing from the homepage via a category entry point.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a category card from the category grid
Verify a product listing page is displayed for the selected category

title: Homepage featured product card opens product details
description: Verifies users can open a product details view from the featured products section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a featured product card
Verify a product details view is displayed

title: Homepage trust signals section is visible
description: Verifies trust/reassurance content is present to support conversion.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the lower part of the page
Verify trust or service highlights are displayed

title: Homepage handles empty featured products state gracefully
description: Verifies the homepage can show a stable UI when featured products are not available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the featured products section
Verify an empty state or absence of featured product cards is handled without a broken layout

title: Catalog page loads categories grid
description: Verifies the catalog page renders the categories grid as the primary content.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Verify a categories grid is displayed
Verify category items display a product count indicator

title: Catalog category selection navigates to category products listing
description: Verifies users can jump into a category from the catalog page.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category tile
Verify a product grid is displayed for the selected category

title: Catalog shows fallback UI when categories cannot be loaded
description: Verifies a user-visible fallback state is shown instead of a broken page when categories fail to load.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Verify a fallback message is visible indicating categories could not be loaded

title: Category products page loads product grid and filters
description: Verifies a category listing page shows products and available filters for refinement.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category tile
Verify a product grid is displayed
Verify sidebar filters for brand, price, and availability are displayed

title: Category products filtering by brand updates results
description: Verifies selecting a brand filter changes the product grid content accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category tile
Select a brand option in the brand filter
Verify the product grid updates to show results matching the selected brand

title: Category products filtering by availability updates results
description: Verifies toggling availability filter refines visible products.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category tile
Select an availability filter option
Verify the product grid updates to reflect the selected availability filter

title: Category products filtering by price range updates results
description: Verifies selecting a valid price range refines the listing results.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category tile
Select a valid price range in the price filter
Verify the product grid updates to reflect the selected price range

title: Category products page supports clearing filters
description: Verifies users can clear applied filters and return to the broader product listing.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category tile
Select a brand option in the brand filter
Clear all applied filters
Verify the product grid returns to the unfiltered results state

title: Category products pagination changes displayed results
description: Verifies users can move to the next page of results when pagination is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category tile
Click to go to the next results page
Verify the product grid updates to show a different page of results

title: Search for a product and verify results are displayed
description: Verifies that performing a search shows a list of matching products on the search results page.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill brake pad into the search field
Press Enter
Verify a list of matching products is displayed

title: Search suggestions appear for a partial query
description: Verifies that entering a partial query shows search suggestions.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill bra into the search field
Wait for suggestions to load
Verify search suggestions are displayed

title: Empty search results show a request-not-found form
description: Verifies that searching for an item with no results shows an empty state and a request form for missing items.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill unobtanium into the search field
Press Enter
Verify an empty results state is displayed
Verify a request-not-found form is available

title: Submit a request-not-found form after an empty search
description: Verifies that submitting the missing item request form shows a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill unobtanium into the search field
Press Enter
Scroll to the request-not-found form
Fill unobtanium into the item name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Submit the request-not-found form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Request-not-found form blocks submission with missing required fields
description: Verifies that the missing item request form shows validation errors when required fields are empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill unobtanium into the search field
Press Enter
Scroll to the request-not-found form
Submit the request-not-found form
Verify a form validation error is visible

title: Apply and clear a filter chip on search results
description: Verifies that selecting a filter chip updates the results and that clearing it returns to the prior results state.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Fill brake pad into the search field
Press Enter
Click a filter chip
Click the control to clear the selected filter
Verify the results list is displayed

title: Cart page loads and shows cart contents state
description: Verifies that the cart page loads and shows either items with totals or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Verify the cart page shows an order summary or an empty cart state

title: Update quantity for a cart item and verify totals update
description: Verifies that changing an item's quantity updates the cart totals.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
If the cart is empty, add any available product to the cart from within the site navigation
Increase the quantity for the first cart item
Verify the cart totals update to reflect the new quantity

title: Remove an item from the cart
description: Verifies that removing an item deletes it from the cart list.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
If the cart is empty, add any available product to the cart from within the site navigation
Remove the first cart item
Verify the removed item is no longer displayed in the cart

title: Apply a promo code from the cart page
description: Verifies that submitting a promo code triggers a visible applied or validation outcome in the order summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Fill a promo code into the promo code field
Apply the promo code
Verify a promo code applied or promo code validation outcome is visible in the order summary

title: Checkout page loads and shows primary checkout form
description: Verifies the checkout page loads and presents customer, delivery, and payment inputs needed to place an order.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Verify customer contact fields are displayed
Verify delivery and payment method selection options are displayed

title: Place an order from checkout with valid customer, delivery, and payment details
description: Completes checkout end-to-end and verifies an order confirmation is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a valid full name into the customer name field
Fill a valid phone number into the customer phone field
Fill a valid email into the customer email field
Select a delivery method
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify an order confirmation is visible
Verify an order identifier is displayed

title: Checkout validation: missing customer phone prevents order submission
description: Verifies checkout cannot be submitted when customer phone is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a valid full name into the customer name field
Fill a valid email into the customer email field
Select a delivery method
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify a phone validation error is visible
Verify the order confirmation is not shown

title: Checkout: switching delivery method updates the selected option
description: Verifies the user can change delivery method selection before submitting the order.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Select a delivery method
Select a different delivery method
Verify the newly selected delivery method is indicated as selected

title: Checkout: switching payment method updates the selected option
description: Verifies the user can change payment method selection before submitting the order.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Select a payment method
Select a different payment method
Verify the newly selected payment method is indicated as selected

title: Checkout validation: invalid email format shows an error
description: Verifies the checkout form flags an invalid email format.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a valid full name into the customer name field
Fill a valid phone number into the customer phone field
Fill an invalid email into the customer email field
Submit the checkout order
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Checkout: required delivery method must be selected before submission
description: Verifies order submission is blocked if a delivery method is not selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a valid full name into the customer name field
Fill a valid phone number into the customer phone field
Fill a valid email into the customer email field
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify a delivery method validation error is visible
Verify the order confirmation is not shown

title: Checkout: required payment method must be selected before submission
description: Verifies order submission is blocked if a payment method is not selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill a valid full name into the customer name field
Fill a valid phone number into the customer phone field
Fill a valid email into the customer email field
Select a delivery method
Submit the checkout order
Verify a payment method validation error is visible
Verify the order confirmation is not shown

title: Login page loads and shows primary login fields
description: Verifies the login page loads and provides phone and password fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify a phone field is displayed
Verify a password field is displayed

title: Login succeeds with valid phone and password
description: Logs in with valid credentials and verifies the user is signed in via observable UI state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user is shown as signed in

title: Login fails with invalid password and shows an error
description: Attempts login with wrong password and verifies an error is displayed and user remains logged out.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill an incorrect password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify the user is not shown as signed in

title: Login validation: empty required fields block submission
description: Verifies the login form enforces required fields and prevents submission when missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the login form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Register page loads and shows primary registration fields
description: Verifies the registration page loads with fields needed to create an account.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Verify name, phone, email, and password fields are displayed

title: Register succeeds with valid details and signs the user in
description: Creates a new account with valid details and verifies the user is signed in after registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill "Test User" into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is shown as signed in

title: Register validation: invalid email format shows an error
description: Verifies registration flags an invalid email format before creating an account.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill "Test User" into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill an invalid email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Register validation: missing required fields block submission
description: Verifies registration cannot be submitted when required fields are empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Submit the registration form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Favorites page loads and displays saved products section
description: Verifies the favorites page primary content renders and indicates saved products or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
Verify the saved products list area is displayed
Verify either favorite product cards are displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Favorites page shows empty state when no items have been saved
description: Verifies the favorites page communicates an empty saved list when there are no favorites.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If any favorite items are present, remove them from favorites one by one
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no favorite product cards are displayed

title: Navigate from Favorites to a product details page
description: Verifies a user can open a product detail from the favorites grid.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If the favorites list is empty, add any product to favorites from elsewhere in the site using normal navigation
Click a favorite product card to open its details
Verify a product details view is displayed

title: Remove an item from Favorites and verify it disappears
description: Verifies the core delete action for favorites works through the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If the favorites list is empty, add any product to favorites from elsewhere in the site using normal navigation
Remove one product from favorites
Verify the removed product no longer appears in the favorites list

title: Favorites list persists after page reload
description: Verifies favorites remain available after refreshing, consistent with local persistence.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If the favorites list is empty, add any product to favorites from elsewhere in the site using normal navigation
Reload the page
Verify favorite product cards are still displayed

title: Select Car page loads and shows step-by-step selector
description: Verifies the vehicle selection page renders its primary selection controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Verify the car selection flow is displayed
Verify a car brand selection control is available

title: Complete car selection flow: brand -> model -> year
description: Verifies the primary multi-step vehicle selection workflow completes through the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Select a car brand from the brand selector
Select a car model from the model selector
Select a year from the year selector
Verify the selected brand, model, and year are reflected as the active vehicle selection

title: Model selector remains unavailable until a brand is chosen
description: Verifies step gating: users cannot choose a model before selecting a brand.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Verify the model selection control is disabled or unavailable before selecting a brand
Select a car brand from the brand selector
Verify the model selection control becomes available

title: Year selector remains unavailable until a model is chosen
description: Verifies step gating: users cannot choose a year before selecting a model.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Select a car brand from the brand selector
Verify the year selection control is disabled or unavailable before selecting a model
Select a car model from the model selector
Verify the year selection control becomes available

title: Changing brand resets dependent selections (model/year)
description: Verifies updating an earlier step clears downstream selections to prevent invalid combinations.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Select a car brand from the brand selector
Select a car model from the model selector
Select a year from the year selector
Change the selected car brand to a different brand
Verify the model and year selections are cleared or require re-selection

title: About page loads and displays company information and stats
description: Verifies the about page renders its primary content sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify company information content is displayed
Verify company statistics or values content is displayed

title: About page renders stable content after reload
description: Verifies the about page content remains visible and does not regress after a refresh.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Reload the page
Verify company information content is displayed

title: Contacts page loads contact details and map
description: Verifies the Contacts page renders the primary contact information and an embedded map section.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Verify contact information is displayed
Verify a map section is displayed

title: Submit feedback successfully with valid inputs
description: Verifies a customer can submit the feedback form and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Scroll to the feedback form
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill a valid Kyrgyzstan phone number into the phone field
Fill Question about delivery time into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Feedback form validates empty message
description: Verifies the feedback form blocks submission when the message is empty and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Scroll to the feedback form
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill a valid Kyrgyzstan phone number into the phone field
Submit the feedback form
Verify a message validation error is visible

title: Feedback form validates invalid phone format
description: Verifies the feedback form shows a validation error when the phone number format is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Scroll to the feedback form
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill 123 into the phone field
Fill Question into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Feedback submission remains blocked when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the feedback form does not submit and shows validation when required fields are not provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Scroll to the feedback form
Fill Question into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Delivery page loads delivery methods and payment options
description: Verifies the Delivery page renders delivery method options and payment method options.

steps.description: Navigate to /delivery
Verify delivery methods are displayed
Verify payment options are displayed

title: Delivery page shows FAQ content
description: Verifies the Delivery page displays FAQ content as supporting information.

steps.description: Navigate to /delivery
Scroll to the FAQ section
Verify delivery FAQ items are displayed

title: Delivery method can be selected on the Delivery page
description: Verifies a user can choose a delivery method and the selection is reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /delivery
Select a delivery method option
Verify the selected delivery method is indicated

title: Payment option can be selected on the Delivery page
description: Verifies a user can choose a payment option and the selection is reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /delivery
Select a payment option
Verify the selected payment option is indicated
